MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRINI, CHARLES COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, CAROLE ANN AKA CAROLE ANN GOLDMAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 FILBERT ST, #1-V, S.F, CA. $3,205.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,205.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-04-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEC DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY.DEF. MAY SEEK 1 WK. EXTENSION ON EVICTION, BUT PL. RESERVES RIGHT TO OPPOSE. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
